cycle_summary.note: 25 auto-generated pieces BLOCKED (same template slop generator bug). 10 pipeline tweets APPROVED (excellent quality, real data, @pipelineabuser voice). 20 outreach drafts APPROVED (strong personalization, specific pain points). Buffer export has formatting leaks but not new content.

blocked_files.notes: Same broken generator. 5 lazy prefix templates ('tool find that saves hours.', 'cold email alpha.', 'content format that's working right now.', 'monetization angle worth testing.', 'signal worth paying attention to.') pasted before raw alpha text. Cross-niche variants use 'built this.', 'alpha:', 'every hustle needs purpose.', 'discipline compounds.' Zero voice matching. Typo: 'i analyses' should be 'i analyzed'. Content truncated with '..' endings.

approved_files.notes: EXCELLENT. 3 standalone tweets + 7-tweet thread. All building-in-public with real pipeline data (1.45M domains, 156,700 analyzed, 14,216 hot leads, 989,204 emails drafted, $0 cost). Consequence-first hooks. @pipelineabuser voice. Zero banned words. Zero em dashes. Ready to post.
4 Upwork proposals + 6 local biz cold call scripts. Strong personalization (mentions specific business names, URLs, locations, pain points). Realistic scope estimates. Clear ROI framing. No AI slop.

3 local biz cold emails + 2 freelance proposals + 5 HN applications. Cold emails are standout quality: mention specific broken things on real URLs (no SSL, mobile broken, missing contact forms). Under 100 words. Human voice.

outreach_review.notes: Both lead machine batches are high quality. Local biz cold emails are particularly strong - real business names, specific website issues, clear ROI math. Upwork proposals show technical depth without over-promising. HN applications are appropriate format.

csv_auto_generator.issue: Prefix template + raw paste. 18 cycles and still producing slop.

pipeline_tweet_generator.note: Real data, proper voice. Best content source.

scale_verdict_to_content.issue: Identical templates for every alpha entry

most_common_failures: template_slop (25 new pieces from csv_auto_generator, same bug as C14-C17)
lazy_prefix_pattern ('tool find that saves hours.' before raw alpha paste)
content_truncation (posts end with '..' instead of complete thoughts)

trend.direction: STABLE — approved sources excellent, auto_generator still broken
remaining_persistent: csv_auto_generator STILL BROKEN after 18 cycles — P0 fix needed
HUMAN: 400+ approved posts, 0 posted, Day 37 at $0
